# Creative Kit

## Brand Colors

- **Primary:** <!-- e.g., "#6366F1 (indigo)" -->
- **Secondary:** <!-- e.g., "#10B981 (emerald)" -->
- **Accent:** <!-- e.g., "#F59E0B (amber)" -->
- **Background:** <!-- e.g., "#0F172A (slate-900)" -->

## Typography

- **Headings:** <!-- e.g., "Inter Bold" -->
- **Body:** <!-- e.g., "Inter Regular, 16px" -->
- **Code:** <!-- e.g., "JetBrains Mono" -->

## Visual Style

- **Mood:** <!-- e.g., "Developer-friendly, minimal, dark mode" -->
- **Photography:** <!-- e.g., "No stock photos, use screenshots and diagrams" -->
- **Icons:** <!-- e.g., "Lucide icons, 24px stroke" -->

## Visual Brand Style

<!-- AGENT INSTRUCTIONS:
Run /visual-style to build this section. Three modes: Extract (from URL), Build (interview), Reference (mood board).
This section powers image generation via /image-gen. Without it, images are generic but functional.
Priority: Fill Primary Aesthetic first, then Lighting + Mood, then Reference Prompts.
-->

- **Primary Aesthetic:** <!-- e.g., "Swiss Design x ASCII", "warm tech minimalism", "editorial photography" -->
- **Lighting:** <!-- e.g., "rim lighting with warm tones", "soft diffused, golden hour" -->
- **Backgrounds:** <!-- e.g., "dark with warm accents", "clean white studio" -->
- **Composition:** <!-- e.g., "single focal point, generous negative space" -->
- **Mood:** <!-- e.g., "cozy futurism -- tech that feels human" -->
- **Avoid:** <!-- e.g., "generic tech imagery, cold/sterile, stock photos, floating cubes" -->
- **Reference Prompts:**
  <!-- 2-3 proven prompts that capture the brand look. Used as style anchors by /image-gen. -->
